description.value: Price 25,700 gp; Slot none; CL 8th; Weight 8 lbs.; Aura moderate conjuration DESCRIPTION When this +2 frost repeating heavy crossbow is empty and underwater, pulling the reloading lever as a free action creates and loads a bolt of solid ice. The icicle bolt and its wielder ignore all penalties for using a ranged weapon underwater. The icicle bolt deals an amount of cold damage equal to that of a normal bolt and melts 1 round after leaving the crossbow. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 13,200 gp; Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells freedom of movement, icicle dagger
